title: oxytropis korabensis
intro: Oxytropis korabensis, also known as Korab mountain treacle bed or Korab oxytrope, is a rare, yellow-flowered flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain glycosides and phenolic compounds, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oxytropis korabensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
